function.name: run_hybrid_search
function.description: Generates a precise OpenSearch query for healthcare professional opinion data. This function creates an optimized search query that uses the exact minimum number of filters needed (maximum 3 keyword filters) with proper syntax and structure. It follows mapping rules for author names, drug names, clinical trials, sentiment, diseases, and time periods. It includes semantic search (kNN embeddings) only when content analysis is needed for questions about opinions, summarization, or analysis. The function returns a properly formatted JSON search query with '_source': True (capital T) and appropriate filters based on the user's question.

query.description: The OpenSearch query object with properly structured bool queries, must clauses, filters, and embedding vectors (when needed). The query should follow the structure: { 'query': { 'bool': { 'must': [...] } }, '_source': True, 'size': 50 }. Use kNN for semantic search only when necessary for analyzing post content. Filters should match appropriate columns (Author, Drugs present in the Post, Clinical Trials present in the Post, etc.).

function.name: python_after_sql
function.description: This function is for python handling after sql execution to handle visualization and complex filteration that can't handled by sql. Strictly use this function after the sql query is executed and the result is obtained. Never forget to use this function after the sql query is executed and the result is obtained.

query.description: The Python code used after SQL handles visualizations and complex filtering that SQL cannot manage.when using this tool STRICTLY Always import the libraries required in the code.ALWAYS ASSUME THE LIBRARIES ARE NOT IMPORTED AND IMPORT AT THE BEGINING OF THE CODE.

function.name: insights_response
function.description: This function is all about to providing insights. It is must used after completing the visualization part. You must call this function to get data to provide rich insights. Function should be called if mentioned in the system prompt else leave it

query.description: Function call to get data and provide insights

function.name: text_processor
function.description: This function analyzes and processes free-form text data to extract structured insights. It is designed to work with dataframes containing text columns and transforms unstructured text into meaningful, structured information for analysis.

text_column.description: The name of the column containing the text data to be processed
